The '''floater shark''' was one of the predatory subspecies of [[Floater (creature)|floaters]] found on the atmosphere of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]]. It attacked anything it perceived as food, and was invulnerable to weapons smaller than a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]].
